title: pulmonaria montana subsp. mollis
intro: Pulmonaria montana subsp. mollis, also known as lungwort, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues and wounds. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats, due to their expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Pulmonaria montana subsp. mollis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, offering a natural remedy for those seeking alternative health solutions.
